monthly_summary_note: Maintainer closed issue #222 on 2026-06-08. Do not create monthly activity summary issues.

notes: 2026-07-06 run 28761803759: Tasks 3(alt)+6. Task 3 alt (no human bugs): fixed detail_scroll not reset on 'P' (pin filter cycle) in handler.rs, created PR #aw_fix_scroll; 372 tests pass. Task 6: commented on PR #275 noting superseded by #298. Monthly summary disabled by maintainer.
